---
title: "Prospective Students"
subtitle: "Graduate supervision across three units at PUC"
---

Members of the Social Networks Group – UC supervise graduate research in social network analysis, statistical network models, and related computational and organizational applications across three units:

::: {.snuc-cards}
<div class="snuc-card">
### Institute of Sociology
*Instituto de Sociología*

<!-- TODO: add specific program (Magíster/Doctorado), supervisor(s), application deadlines. -->
</div>

<div class="snuc-card">
### School of Government
*Escuela de Gobierno*

<!-- TODO: add specific program, supervisor(s), application deadlines. -->
</div>

<div class="snuc-card">
### Faculty of Education
*Facultad de Educación*

<!-- TODO: add specific program, supervisor(s), application deadlines. -->
</div>
:::

Interested applicants are encouraged to reach out before applying to discuss research fit — see [Contact](contact.qmd).
